Package main.services

Class Service

java.lang.Object
main.services.Service
All Implemented Interfaces:
ICSLService
Direct Known Subclasses:
AlertsService, AutoCryptService, CpeServices, CSLService, CSLServiceDemo, CSLServiceIDS, CSLServiceJsonDataBase, CveServices, DiscoveryServices, MonitorService, NmapServices, StatusService, SuricataServices, TapsServices
public abstract class Service extends Object implements ICSLService
Generic Service with a name, description, a configuration file and an API command.

  • Constructor Details

    • Service

      public Service(String name, String description, String configFileSectionName)
      Constructor of the generic Service with a name, a description and a configuration filename
      Parameters:
      name - name of the service
      description - description of the service
      configFileSectionName - name of corresponding configuration file

    • Service

      public Service(String name, String description, String configFileSectionName, String rootAPI)
      Constructor of the generic Service with a name, a description, a configuration filename and a root for the api commands
      Parameters:
      name - name of the service
      description - description of the service
      configFileSectionName - name of corresponding configuration file
      rootAPI - root for the api commands

    • Service

      public Service(String name, String configFileSectionName)
      Constructor of the generic Service with a name and a configuration filename
      Parameters:
      name - name of the service
      configFileSectionName - name of corresponding configuration file

  • Method Details

    • init

      public abstract boolean init(Json jConfig, String cslDir)
      Generic function where one will add the custom commands
      Specified by:
      init in interface ICSLService
      Parameters:
      jConfig - the configuration section of the configuration file
      cslDir - the CSL directory
      Returns:
      true if the initialization happened with no problems, false otherwise.

    • addCmd

      public String addCmd(String name, IJsonCmd cmd)
      Register an API command.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the command.
      cmd - The callback to be executed when the command is invoked.
      Returns:
      A String

    • addCmd

      public String addCmd(String name, IJsonCmd cmd, IJsonCmdHelp help)
      Register an API command.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the command.
      cmd - The callback to be executed when the command is invoked.
      help - The helper to display in the '/apihelp' page.
      Returns:
      A String

    • addCmd

      public String addCmd(Endpoint endpoint, IJsonCmd cmd)
      Register an API command.
      Parameters:
      endpoint - endpoint information: cmd and help
      cmd - The callback to be executed when the command is invoked.
      Returns:
      A String
